task_intent: Build bounded context packet contract and CLI consumer.

context_budget.policy: Use selected memory IDs and source lineage only; reject full docs/memory scans and lab history by default.

selected_context.reason: Reject repo-local memory-core claims and require selected memory IDs, rejected context, application guidance, and feedback.

rejected_context.reason: Full memory-bank scans are context dumps; this run may use only selected memory IDs.
.krn is runtime evidence/cache/ledger and must not be treated as authoritative memory.

context_sections.summary: Build bounded context packet contract and CLI consumer.
Apply selected memory IDs through guidance; do not copy authoritative memory bodies into runtime evidence.
Required kernel terms: memory-operative, context-budgeted, deletion-friendly.
Verify through context-packet contract tests, CLI behavior tests, typecheck, and git diff checks.

required_skills.name: goal-execplan
required_skills.reason: Context packets are restartable execution input for Codex work.

required_skills.name: typescript-contract-engineer
required_skills.reason: The task touches TypeScript contracts, parsers, CLI, or package boundaries.

blocked_actions: Do not load docs/memory/** as a context dump.
Do not treat .krn/** as authoritative memory core.
